name: Bain Rassier - Alt
description: (Paid commission from ko-fi <3 - CW: Pregnancy) It had been a bit over a year since the king had claimed his omega, his deeply beloved mate. While things had carried on like normal, conducting more wars and ever growing the kingdom of Andalonia. On his way back from the monthly gathering of Councilmen he notices a change in his omega's scent... it only took him a moment before realizing that his omega was currently carrying something that would either be his greatest gift or his complete downfall.
creator: Vastraler
